notes: Curated Force power profiles (Phase 0 audit §3). Force powers get curated profiles, never blind inference, and NEVER default to damage type 'force' — 'force-power' and 'dark-side' are tags/descriptors, not damage types.

No profile here is 'verified' for damage wiring yet: types come from pack tags/names, which is strong metadata but not printed-source verification. Runtime Force damage stays unimplemented this phase.
Powers absent from this file are classified in docs/audits/generated/damage-profile-audit.json; damage-capable powers without a profile land in manualRequired.
Defensive powers (Force Shield, Energy Resistance, Negate Energy) are encoded as mitigation-flow boundaries so nothing turns them into instant damage packets. Force Weapon stays deferred.

profiles.name: Force Lightning
notes: Lightning/electrical power → electricity (energy family), per profile policy. Verify dice/CT rider against printed source before wiring.

profiles.name: Combustion
notes: Pack tags include 'fire'. Possible burning rider — verify before wiring.

riders.notes: Ion condition-track behavior resolves as a rider.

profiles.name: Force Slam
notes: Telekinetic impact → kinetic. Area geometry (cone vs burst) needs printed-source verification.

profiles.name: Move Object (hurled object damage)
notes: Damage only when hurling objects/creatures; size-based dice per printed chart.

profiles.name: Force Thrust
notes: Rider/effect power — no HP damage component unless the printed source adds one.

profiles.name: Force Grip
notes: Deals HP damage per printed source but the damage type is not stated by pack metadata — do not guess.

profiles.name: Force Storm
notes: Pack data conflict: system.damage says '2d6 acid' while the power reads as a lightning storm. Printed source must arbitrate before any type is assigned.

profiles.name: Force Scream
notes: Likely sonic, but not stated by pack metadata — verify before typing.

profiles.name: Negate Energy
notes: BOUNDARY: stays in effect/mitigation flows (ForcePowerEffectsEngine). Never an instant damage packet.

profiles.name: Energy Resistance
notes: BOUNDARY: feeds the typed-resistance mitigation stage (D4). Never an instant damage packet.

profiles.name: Force Shield
notes: BOUNDARY: SR-granting effect flow. Untouched by this phase per standing non-goal.
